name: profile-team
description: Curates a cross-project profile of the people in your world: drains profile-fact markers into person profiles at ~/.atl/profiles, each grown through a self-describing, versioned interface.

agents.name: profile-curator
agents.description: Drains profile-fact markers into person profiles under ~/.atl/profiles: detects the entity type, selects or evolves its interface, fills fields, and rebuilds the profile index.

skills.name: profile-drain
skills.description: /profile-drain — folds pending profile-fact queue items into the global person profiles at ~/.atl/profiles via the profile-curator (privacy-gated, source-flagged, schema lazy-filled).

rules.name: profile-capture
rules.description: The capture reflex: drop profile-fact markers inline when a durable fact about a person the user cares about comes up; atl tick queues them for /profile-drain.
